title: RME's Durability Tooltips
description: Adds simple and fully customisable item durability tooltips.
body:
[![Modrinth downloads badge](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/rmes-durability-tooltips?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&labelColor=black&color=0614FF)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rmes-durability-tooltips) [![CurseForge downloads badge](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1159540?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=black&color=0614FF)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rmes-durability-tooltips)  [![Support Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/discord-0614FF?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&labelColor=black)](https://discord.gg/BrMJdsbkxS)

![Mod icon imitating a Minecraft tooltip counting down](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44fc7d93519cd11357f1f29bd4dcdd702d5723e8.gif)

### Features
- **Lightweight:** Incredibly small footprint mod that isn't overly complicated.
- **Fully compatible:** Nothing required other than the Fabric API, but fully compatible with other mods like Mod Menu, YACL, and Cloth Config.
- **Customisable:** Every colour, visibility, and part of the mod is customisable.

This was originally a fork of [ddeeddii's Durability Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/durability-plus) under the MIT license, iterating on it and making it more polished.

Due to fulfilling the *exact same function*, it's not recommended having both mods installed.

![A collage of multiple tooltips showing three different durability levels: 250 in green, 160 in yellow, and 60 in red.](https://i.imgur.com/5tTEjTh.png)

Simple and elegant durability tooltips for Fabric. Requires **Fabric API**
